intended_use: AI-Rad Companion Prostate MR is a post-processing image analysis software that assists clinicians in viewing, manipulating, analyzing and evaluating MR prostate images for US guided MR-US fusion biops
intended_use_full: AI-Rad Companion Prostate MR is a post-processing image analysis software that assists clinicians in viewing, manipulating, analyzing and evaluating MR prostate images for US guided MR-US fusion biopsy support. AI-Rad Companion Prostate MR provides the following functionalities: Automatic segmentation and quantitative analysis of the prostate gland; Manual annotation of relevant findings; Presentation and export of results for further processing and reporting
target_condition: Prostate lesions requiring biopsy; prostate cancer screening and diagnosis
